portfolio.title: Cyberpunk Alley Composite
portfolio.description: Full photorealistic environment extension. Replaced a basic urban alley with a glowing, rainy neon sci-fi alleyway, including CG hover cars and hologram projections.

portfolio.title: Apex Legends CGI Intro
portfolio.description: Action-packed CGI opening sequence with complex particle dynamics, volumetric smoke, and fluid character animations integrated with graphic titles.

portfolio.title: Social Media Ad Campaign
portfolio.description: High-impact social media video campaign optimized for Instagram Reels and TikTok. Engineered hyper-fast cuts, custom sound FX sweeps, and bold typography overlays.

portfolio.title: Nike Commercial Grade
portfolio.description: High-contrast commercial edit. Directed the dramatic color grading to emphasize muscle definition, texture of the sportswear, and sunrise lighting highlights.

portfolio.title: Synthwave Album Cover
portfolio.description: 80s retro-futuristic cover art featuring a grid-pattern sunset, chrome lettering, and a detailed 3D wireframe sports car styled in Photoshop.

portfolio.title: Aura Perfume Campaign
portfolio.description: Visual identity campaign and package logo branding. Drafted minimal product layouts and rendered 3D product shots in atmospheric settings.

services.title: VFX & Video Production
services.description: Photorealistic CGI integration, green-screen keying, environment extensions, rotoscoping, and full RED/ARRI camera workflows.

services.title: Social Media Campaigns
services.description: High-octane pacing, colour grading, sound design, and narrative edits optimised for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

services.title: Logo Branding & Design
services.description: Creative visual identities, vector logos, corporate style guides, typography animations, and high-converting marketing graphics.
